programme.title: Sharks of the Coral Canyon
programme.desc: Sharks of the Coral Canyon highlights how sharks and coral reefs are intricately linked. The film features first-time-ever footage of sharks hunting at night, as well as new shark hunting behavior. Corals and sharks depend on one another, and must be protected together if either of them is to survive into the future.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Torstein Horgmo - Dose 04
programme.desc: Bullying has long term and far too often, fatal effects. Torstein Horgmo is considered to be one of the top five snowboarders to ever strap in and snowboarding quite literally saved his life. Here is where his Microdose story begins.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Torstein Horgmo - Dose 05
programme.desc: Bullying has long term and far too often, fatal effects. Torstein Horgmo is considered to be one of the top five snowboarders to ever strap in and snowboarding quite literally saved his life. Here is where his Microdose story begins.

programme.desc: Bullying has long term and far too often, fatal effects. Torstein Horgmo is considered to be one of the top five snowboarders to ever strap in and snowboarding quite literally saved his life. Here is where his Microdose story begins.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Eversince
programme.desc: Can you remember the moment you knew you were hooked on snowboarding? 'Eversince' is a film about the first time, and chasing the unforgettable feeling every time after. Featuring: Lucas Debari, Jason Robinson, Keegan Valaika, Lizard King, Manuel Diaz, Bode Merrill, Nicolas Müller, Fredi Kalbermatten, Cale Zima, Brandon Cocard.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 1
programme.desc: Your friends at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 2
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 3
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 4
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 01
programme.desc: Kimmy Fasani is a world class athlete, a loving mother, a natural leader, and a true champion of women in professional snowboarding. In Episode 1 of her Microdose series, we learn where Fasani’s glorious story begins. Featuring Shannon Dunn, Donna Carpenter, Hana Beaman, Gabe Taylor and Ryan Runke.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we learn how Kimmy Fasani stepped away from the contest scene and into backcountry snowboarding with help from shred legend Devun Walsh and innovator Iikka Backstrom. Featuring Chris Benchetler, Devun Walsh, Adam Moran, Bryan Knox and Peter Morning.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 03
programme.desc: As a Burton athlete, Kimmy Fasani has long been a champion of change in women's snowboarding. Innovative products. Fair pay. Better contracts. Sick ripping. Watch and be uplifted. Featuring Hana Beaman, Pat Bridges, Danny Davis, Gabe Taylor, Kevin Pearce, Bryan Knox, Adam Moran and Peter Morning.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: Wash'Dup
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this mockumentary film will follow a group of ex- snowboard filmmakers and ex-pro riders who never hung it up. Still in love with the sport and fueled by mid life crisis, these shred for lifers are extremely vulnerable to delusions of grandeur. But the dream is always “still alive” in their minds. In turn they ignore all the red flags and continue to do what seems completely irrational to everyone except for them. After a 16 year hiatus, they irresponsibly put their adult obligations behind, and join a pact to make just one last movie. But they are missing a solid presence of youth to make their movie marketable. As a remedy they end up filming with riders that span 2 generations. This unlikely alliance leads them to discover much more about snowboarding and themselves by living the snowboarding dream through an ageless lens. Filled with sketch comedy skits, this film expresses the nuanced story of a young sport reaching a level of maturity the current industry now begins to embrace. From the death of the snowboard shop, and extinction of film media, to the old pro struggling to find their way in life after the glory days are long gone, WashDup is a story that finally needs to be told.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1978, the Tour de France à la voile has allowed thousands of sailors to discover the French coast. This yachting race is held in July every year and links the English Channel to the French Riviera. The tour is a great offshore sailing school for amateur sailors, and a high-level competition for the great champions taking part.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode we will be visiting one of the most beautiful spots in Croatia and unknown for many. From historic sites to fabulous new modern spots, Korčula is certainly one of my favorite places in the world. With crystal clear sea this sun-drenched oasis also has plenty of water sports on offer. Get splashed into action with us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of sun-drenched Sail-Ho Croatia! We are on the beautiful island of Hvar getting a little bit tipsy, but seriously the wine here is so good and so is the food. For the ultimate refreshment we have the appetizing crystal-clear sea around us, and we cannot refuse a dip in its warm waters.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 2
programme.desc: Our journey starts visiting two of the very best kiteboarding spots in Europe and Asia. We will catch up all the action in Pingtan, China, at the 2nd leg of the 2018 KiteFoil World Series and the TwinTip Racing Chinese National Championships. Afterwards, we move to the well-known Sardinia Kiteboard Grand Slam at the amazing Poetto Beach. Following the KiteFoil World Series we turn our attention to big boats. We travel to Cyprus and Greece for the ORC European Championship and the Aegean Regatta. These are two top notch events that attract the top sailors.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. After nearly two decades, the end of both the Alinghi and Oracle Eras is here and the kiwis are back on the top of the world. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: European Dragon Championship
programme.desc: The European Dragon Championship promises to amaze spectators with the continent’s top dragon sailors racing in one of the world’s most beautiful sailing arenas, the Italian Riviera.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Semi-Final
programme.desc: As INEOS Team UK won the Round Robins, now it is the time for Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli and NYYC American Magic to compete on this semi-final of the 2021 Prada Cup. The first to win four races will become the final contender against the British team in this competition. Who will that be?

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 1: Eventing Dreams and New Forest Commoning
programme.desc: On this first episode of FEI Ride, we're in the saddle with the first ever Chinese Olympic Eventing Rider before roaming free with the New Forest Ponies of England and testing the stamina of horse and rider at the Longines FEI Endurance World Championship. Join us for a ride!

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Kuwaiti Aspirations Therapeutic Riding
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re in Kuwait for a look at the country’s jumping community past and present, meeting the British woodsman using logging horses to minimise his impact on the environment, making a positive difference to the lives of disabled children in New Zealand with the help of therapy horses, and aiming for Tokyo with Mexican rider Francisco Pasquel.

programme.title: Bloody Streetz
programme.desc: Bloody Streetz is the story of what happens when a ruthless killer for hire runs up against an African spirit and is forced to learn the errors of his ways.

programme.title: Breakdown Lane
programme.desc: When Kirby's SUV stalls in the desert, she must overcome the elements and the lurking undead to get home. Her only companion is Max, the Emergency Car Service Rep trapped in his office by the zombies.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: Infliction
programme.desc: In 2011, two brothers documented their murder spree in North Carolina. This is the actual assembled footage.

programme.title: Blood Punch
programme.desc: A young man breaks out of rehab to follow a mysterious girl into an easy drug score. But when she lures him to an isolated cabin, their simple love triangle quickly descends into a mind-blowing cycle of carnage and mayhem with no escape.

programme.title: Dirty Conscience
programme.desc: A cop thriller from Chile.Two young police recruits are assigned a tough, decorated Officer to train them. It quickly becomes clear that their new boss is involved with serious corruption. At first the two young cops try to look the other way. But as their boss begins to doubt their loyalty, the two recruits must choose between saving their honor and their careers--before their boss has them killed.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E06 - Alutiq Anniversary
programme.desc: It's Game On for the Ewing Family as they plan a dinner to celebrate the 20th Anniversary of the AlutIq Museum. On the menu: clam fritters with kelp, kelp with rhubarb and cranberry jam, game meat with horse-radish mash potatoes with mushrooms, asparagus and leeks. The challenge is on to produce a memorable dinner from local ingredients for the Alutiq people and presenting it in a way that they have never had it before.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E07 - Bush Pilot's Birthday
programme.desc: A Bush Pilot's Birthday warrants a treat of a menu with pacific spot prawns and pasta to kick off this episode's menu followed by duck breast with celery root and for the main course there is rabbit and carrots.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E01 - Into the High Lonesome
programme.desc: Laramy Sasquatch Miller sets off on The Trail with his trusty horse 7, to test his survival skills and pay homage to mountain men of the past. Saying goodbye to his family, Laramy and 7 have to battle the elements, build shelter, live off of the land, and survive a 30-day trek through the backcountry.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E06 - Flood
programme.desc: When the levee breaks, the stuff really hits the fan…. Desperate Hours looks at some of the most devastating floods in history including the flood of Rio De Janeiro in Brazil, the Louisiana floods in the United States, the Hamburg floods in Germany, the Uttarakhand floods in North India, and the Indian Ocean tsunami in Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E07 - Geological Disasters
programme.desc: Sometimes, all that it takes is a shift underfoot…. Desperate Hours looks at major geological disasters including avalanches in Afghanistan, Pakistan, Nepal, Peru, and France. It also looks at geological landslides in the Philippines, India and Columbia and an enormous sinkhole that consumed a pond in Bosnia. It also looks at Blizzards in the United States, Israel, and United Kingdom.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E08 - Nuclear Industrial
programme.desc: When humans are a serious danger to themselves ... Desperate Hours looks at nuclear and industrial disasters including the Fukushima Nuclear Power Plant disaster in Japan, the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant disaster in Ukraine, the Deepwater Oil Spill in the Gulf of Mexico, the Savar Plaza disaster in Bangladesh, and the Bhopal Gas disaster in India. When a catastrophic event strikes a nuclear power facility the resulting disaster can be, literally, off the scale and last for decades.

programme.title: Desperate Hours - S01:E09 - Disaster at Sea
programme.desc: Seafaring is a dangerous business indeed…… Desperate Hours looks at major disasters on the high seas including the Sewol Ferry disaster in South Korea, the Ferry Estonia in the Baltic Sea, the sinking of the Titanic, the Exxon Valdez in Prince William Sound Alaska, the Express Samina in Portes Islets, pirates attacking the Maersk Alabama and Seabourn Spirit, and the Costa Concordia in the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E07 - Motherly Love
programme.desc: After weeks of trying to survive in Saskatchewan, Chris and Casey have yet to kill big game. Time is running out as the bear begin to hibernate. Mental willpower is wearing thin. But a message from back home changes everything.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E08 - Refuelled
programme.desc: A turn of events lifts the brothers’ spirits, but creates a huge hurdle they must overcome as they enter a new race against the clock.Chris and Casey reflect on the challenges they have faced so far, and the challenges that still lie ahead.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E09 - The End
programme.desc: In the exciting season finale, Chris lays it all on the line one last time while bear hunting. Casey must finish one final task to make the fruits of their labor worthwhile. As the brothers inch closer to safety, they wonder what the future holds.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E10 - Reca
programme.desc: Dive deep into the season of Dropped as the brothers recap an epic 30 day adventure through the Canadian Bush.
Marc is a surfer and lives his life one day at a time. But after many strokes of fate, he dreams of turning back time, and starting all over again.

programme.desc: The poetic tale of a man with a neurological disorder and the enigmatic nurse persuaded to support him with assisted suicide.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: You Can Change The End
programme.desc: You might not be able to change your past, but you can change what happens next. When life feels stuck or uncertain, remember this: the result belongs to God, but your response is still in your hands. You don’t have to control the outcome, just move forward and trust Him with what comes next.

programme.title: How To Surrender To God
programme.desc: God isn’t afraid of your struggle. In fact, He’s inviting you to face it, because He knows what’s on the other side. Stop running, hold onto Him, and let Him change you from the inside out.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God’s trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn’t the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you’ve been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn’t give a test without a lesson first, so if He’s calling you to let go of something, you can trust He’s already provided you with what you’ll need to take that step.

programme.title: You Don't Have To
programme.desc: Feeling overwhelmed by the pressure of obstacles and obligations? Shift your attention from how you’ll get through it to Who will get you through it. You’re not alone, God is with you.

programme.title: God Will Work It In!
programme.desc: Sometimes, even when your situation isn’t getting better, you are. Stop stressing like you need to do it alone and remember that God is with you in it. He’s already given you what you need — and He’ll help you work it in to what you’re facing.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila pressures Alfredo by continuing with her plan, she reveals that Alfredo is her godmother's son, whom she abandoned when he was almost born. Elda alone, crying, because deep down she is not happy with what she did. Sebastian, shocked, when Axel confesses that Amelia's son is his.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: In the middle of the art auction, the Del Casal couple has a furtive encounter with Victoria and Sergio; Florencia believes that Victoria is furious to see her with her beloved Nicolás, but Victoria clarifies that Nicolás is only with her for commitment and nothing else. Carlos Hansen shows up at Cantarrana to propose a deal to Hilario: he will move to another country with Adelaida if Guanipa signs the divorce; Hilario is not willing to accept without putting up a fight. Fernanda has made the decision to send her daughter Eugenia to a Swiss boarding school, because Yosmir's bad influence is what has caused the girl's rebellious attitudes. After having signed the divorce, Adelaida is happy because now she will be able to rebuild her life with Hansen, who lets her know that they will have to move to meet Hilario.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Convinced that Victoria is not ready to fall in love again, Sergio doesn't want her to deceive herself, as if she cannot forget Nicolás, it is best that she stays away from him, but Victoria prevents this. Before leaving for his new life in another country, Hansen leaves instructions for Felipe to be in charge of the bank; Hansen hopes that Osuna will truly find her happiness; in the meantime, Adelaida bids farewell to her daughter with the same intention: for Victoria to be happy; Adelaida also asks Victoria to forgive her father. In Cantarrana, Genara is curious to know if Victoria would forgive her father, who has returned to the estate; devastated and remorseful for his actions; Victoria wants to forgive her father but doesn't know how. After discovering that Hilario visited Florencia, Nicolás confronts him in defense of his wife, but Guanipa assures him that he will be the one to take his woman away; at that moment, the heated argument is interrupted by Victoria.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis plots a mass shooting for the party. Alberto is caught up in memories of the past, including a letter where Lorenita declared her love for him. At the Oceanography Institute, Isabel surprises Malena with a bouquet of flowers as a show of 'admiration' for her new appointment. Guillermo warns Lorena of the danger her son faces for having fled the Corona household without killing Marco Aurelio.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena tries to send Alberto away, but he only seeks to break the ice and plays alluding to his childhood loves; provoking even more anger and jealousy in Guillermo, who remains threatening - Ricardo decides to hire the electrician services of María Bonita Echeverri, as a way to approach one of the four suspects with the same last name Echeverri of the theft of the check.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Lara Portillo is arranging to purchase DNA tests to prove that the young woman does not carry the blood of any of the Santa Maria's in her veins.

programme.title: El Desprecio

programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina visita a la Madre Isabel para hablarle sobre su relación con Rosa Blanco, quien fue su mejor amiga y ella la traicionó; por eso quiere impedir su regreso.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Juego del Sexo
programme.desc: Un alienígena cambiante procedente del espacio exterior causa estragos en un pequeño pueblo rural del suroeste de Estados Unidos, cerca del legendario Área 51 de fama ovni. Estos extraterrestres son una raza devoradora de cerebros a quienes les encanta decapitar y comerse a los humanos. Están entre nosotros y lo han estado durante millones de años.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: ¡Ni Te Me Acerques!
programme.desc: Él solo tenía que cuidar el hotel y teclear su novela, como Jack Nicholson en “El Resplandor”, pero de buen rollo. Y Llega la cuarentena y se queda le pilla en el Hotel Balneario de Ariño haciendo frente a la paranoia general, el acoso de las fuerzas del orden, las videollamadas de su novia, su madre y del conspiranoico Javi... Todos nos aburrimos mucho en el primer confinamiento. Juan no.

programme.title: El Secuestro
programme.desc: Un joven con talento en la música sueña con ser un gran artista hasta que conoce al hijo de un poderoso narcotraficante colombiano quién promete ayudarlo a cambio de que trabaje para ellos. El joven no se imagina en que mundo se está metiendo. La fama le costará lo que más ama.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
